recommendations.title: Standing Tall
recommendations.overview: The film tells the story of Malony and his education as he grows from a six-year-old into an 18-year-old. A minors’ judge and a caseworker work tirelessly to try to save the young offender.

recommendations.title: Peaceful
recommendations.overview: A son in denial of a serious illness. A mother facing the unbearable. And between them a doctor fighting to do his job and bring them to acceptance. The three of them have one year and four seasons to come together and understand what it means to die

recommendations.title: Student Services
recommendations.overview: Nineteen-year-old Laura is stressed by her first year at college when money worries distract her from her studies and so, desperate for cash, she answers an online advertisement for intimate companionship that leads her down a dangerous path.

recommendations.title: I, Daniel Blake
recommendations.overview: A middle aged carpenter, who requires state welfare after injuring himself, is joined by a single mother in a similar scenario.

recommendations.title: The Good Nurse
recommendations.overview: Suspicious that her colleague is responsible for a series of mysterious patient deaths, a nurse risks her own life to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Pi
recommendations.overview: A mathematical genius discovers a link between numbers and reality, and thus believes he can predict the future.

recommendations.title: Caddo Lake
recommendations.overview: When an 8-year-old girl mysteriously vanishes on Caddo Lake, a series of past deaths and disappearances begin to link together, forever altering a broken family’s history.

recommendations.title: The Players
recommendations.overview: Eight short films explore the subject of male infidelity. Serial cheaters, Fred and Greg, spend a night on the town doing what they do best, and with absolutely no regrets. The duo play various characters in assorted extracurricular situations, rangi
recommendations.director: Michel Hazanavicius, Emmanuelle Bercot, Gilles Lellouche, Jean Dujardin, Fred Cavayé, Alexandre Courtes, Eric Lartigau

recommendations.title: Making Of

recommendations.title: Fearless Hyena
